passive.name: Power Chord
passive.description:
Accelerando: Sona gains non-Ultimate ability haste permanently for her basic abilities as she uses her abilities well, up to a cap. Beyond that cap, further successful uses reduce her ultimate's remaining cooldown instead.

Power Chord: Every few spell casts, Sona's next attack will deal bonus magic damage in addition to an additional effect based on what basic Ability Sona last activated.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate - Accelerando:}} {{ci|Sona}} gains a permanent stack of ''Accelerando'' each time she hits an enemy champion with ''{{ai|Hymn of Valor|Sona}}'' and each time she mitigates sufficient damage or heals damaged allies with ''{{ai|Aria of Perseverance|Sona}}''. If she has max stacks, she instead {{sti|cdr|reduces}} the cooldown of ''{{ai|Crescendo|Sona}}'' each time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: [[File:Sona Power Chord 3.gif|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Innate - Melody:}} '''Sona's''' basic abilities incur a {{sti|cd|brief}} cooldown on her other basic abilities, and cause her to generate a unique [[aura]] for a short time that empowers herself and nearby allied champions.
wiki_detail.blurb3: [[File:Sona Power Chord.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Innate - Power Chord:}} '''Sona's''' basic abilities generate permanent stacks of ''Power Chord''. At 3 stacks, her next basic attack consumes them all to become empowered with bonus magic damage and apply an additional effect based on the last basic ability cast.
wiki_detail.blurb4: [[File:Power Chord.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Accelerando:}} For each stack, '''Sona''' gains {{sti|ah|basic ability haste}}.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Innate - Accelerando:}} '''Sona''' generates a [[stack]] of ''Accelerando'' each time she hits an enemy {{tip|champion}} with ''{{ai|Hymn of Valor|Sona}}'' and each time she mitigates sufficient damage or heals damaged allies with ''{{ai|Aria of Perseverance|Sona}}'', stacking up to 120 times. At maximum stacks, she instead reduces the {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} of ''{{ai|Crescendo|Sona}}'' by {{fd|1.5}} seconds each time.

[[File:Power Chord.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Accelerando:}} For each stack, '''Sona''' gains {{sti|ah|{{fd|0.5}}}} [[Ability_haste#Increasing_basic_ability_haste|basic ability haste]], up to 60 at maximum stacks.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate - Melody:}} Whenever '''Sona''' casts a [[champion ability|basic ability]], her other basic abilities incur a {{sti|cd|{{fd|0.5}}-second}} global cooldown and she generates a unique [[aura]] for 3 seconds that empowers herself and nearby allied champions.
wiki_detail.description3:
{{sbc|Innate - Power Chord:}} '''Sona's''' basic abilities generate a stack of ''Power Chord'', stacking up to 3 times. At 3 stacks, her next [[basic attack]] is empowered to consume them all to have an {{tip|uncancellable windup}}, deal {{as|{{pp|20 to 90 for 8;90 to 240|formula=10 + 10 per level until level 8, then + 15 per level}}|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 20% AP)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}, and apply an additional effect based on the last basic ability she cast:
* ''{{ai|Hymn of Valor|Sona}}'' - {{sbc|Staccato:}} Deals {{as|{{pp|20*1.5 to 90*1.5 for 8;90*1.5 to 240*1.5|formula=15 + 15 per level until level 8, then + 22.5 per level}}|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 30% AP)}} {{as|'''modified''' magic damage}}.
* ''{{ai|Aria of Perseverance|Sona}}'' - {{sbc|Diminuendo:}} Reduces the target's [[size]] by 8% and damage dealt by 25% {{as|(+ 4% per 100 AP)}} for 3 seconds.
* ''{{ai|Song of Celerity|Sona}}'' - {{sbc|Tempo:}} {{tip|Slows}} the target by 50% {{as|(+ 4% per 100 AP)}} for 2 seconds, capped at a maximum of 99%.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Gaining Power Chord's empowered attack {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Sona's''' basic attack timer.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Power Chord'' stacks are represented by a counter under '''Sona's''' [[health bar]], visible to the player only. It will light up when the empowered effect is available.
** When ''Power Chord'' is ready, '''Sona''' gains a ring around her. This ring will have a different color depending on the last ability used (''{{ai|Hymn of Valor|Sona|blue}}, {{ai|Aria of Perseverance|Sona|green}} or {{ai|Song of Celerity|Sona|purple}}'').
** The effect does not change if abilities are used while the projectile is in motion.
* The triggering attack will apply other [[on-hit effect]]s and can {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} as normal.
* '''Sona''' retains ''Power Chord's'' stacks when entering {{tip|resurrection}}.
* The empowered attack will trigger but not be consumed nor apply its effects against [[ward]]s.

Q.name: Hymn of Valor
Q.description: Sona plays the Hymn of Valor, sends out bolts of sound, dealing magic damage to two nearby enemies, prioritizing champions and monsters. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allies tagged by the zone bonus damage on their next attack against enemies.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Sona}} projects sound bolts to the two nearest enemies that each deal {{as|magic damage}}, and she gains a stack of ''{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Accelerando}}'' for each bolt that damages an enemy {{tip|champion}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: [[File:Sona Hymn of Valor 2.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Melody|image=*none*}} Bonus:}} '''Sona''' and tagged allied champions deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} on their next basic attack within a few seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Power Chord}} – Staccato:}} ''Power Chord'' deals {{as|'''increased''' magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Sona''' sends out bolts of sound to the two nearest {{tip|sight|visible}} enemies, prioritizing champions. Each bolt deals {{as|magic damage}} and grants {{tip|sight}} of the area around the target for 1 second.

'''Sona''' gains a stack of ''{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Accelerando}}'' for each bolt that hits an enemy {{tip|champion}}.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Melody|image=*none*}} Bonus:}} '''Sona''' and tagged allied champions deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} on their next basic attack within 5 seconds.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|825|Sound bolts search range}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|400|Aura radius, center-to-edge}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Sight of the targets' area is granted on-cast.
* The {{sbc|{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Melody|image=*none*}}}} empowerment given to tagged allies respects {{tip|enchantment redirection}}.
* The empowered attack will trigger but not be consumed against [[ward]]s.

W.name: Aria of Perseverance
W.description: Sona plays the Aria of Perseverance, sending out protective melodies, healing Sona and a nearby wounded ally. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allies tagged by the zone a temporary shield.
W.tooltip:
Active: Sona restores {{ totalheal }} Health to herself and a nearby allied champion, prioritizing the most wounded. She then begins a new Melody.

Melody: Sona gains an aura for {{ auraduration }} seconds, granting allied champions {{ totalshield }} Shield for {{ shieldduration }} seconds.

Gain a stack of Accelerando whenever you heal another injured ally and every time you protect another ally from at least {{ accelerandoshieldbreakpoint }} damage with this shield.

Power Chord - Diminuendo: Power Chord also reduces physical and magic damage dealt by the target by {{ totaldiminuendoweakenpercent }} for {{ diminuendoduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Sona}} {{tip|heals}} herself and projects a sound bolt that heals the most wounded allied champion nearby.
wiki_detail.blurb2: [[File:Sona Aria of Perseverance 2.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Melody|image=*none*}} Bonus:}} '''Sona''' and tagged allied champions receive a brief {{tip|shield}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: '''Sona''' gains a stack of ''{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Accelerando}}'' whenever she {{tip|heals}} an ally or {{tip|shields}} a minimum amount of damage for an ally with ''Aria of Perseverance''.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Power Chord|Sona}} – Diminuendo:}} ''Power Chord'' reduces the target's [[size]] and damage output for a short time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sona''' {{tip|heals}} herself and sends out a tone to heal the {{tt|most wounded|Based on greatest % missing health}} allied champion nearby.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Melody|image=*none*}} Bonus:}} '''Sona''' and tagged allied champions are granted a {{tip|shield}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: '''Sona''' gains a stack of ''{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Accelerando}}'' whenever she {{tip|heals}} a wounded ally or {{tip|shields}} a minimum amount of damage for an ally with ''Aria of Perseverance''.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|1000|Heal search range}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|400|Aura radius, center-to-edge}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* If no one is injured, ''Aria of Perseverance'' will target the closest allied champion.
* The projectile of ''Aria of Perseverance'' will follow an ally in stealth but will not reveal them.

E.name: Song of Celerity
E.description: Sona plays the Song of Celerity, granting nearby allies bonus Move Speed. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allied champions tagged by the zone bonus Move Speed.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Sona}} gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for a short time, which is extended to a few seconds if she does not take damage during this time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: [[File:Sona Song of Celerity 2.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Melody|image=*none*}} Bonus:}} Tagged allied champions gain {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Power Chord}} – Tempo:}} ''Power Chord'' {{tip|slows}} the target for a short time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sona''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|20%|ms}} {{as|(+ 2% per 100 AP)}} {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for 7 seconds. If she takes damage during this time, the duration ends prematurely once or if 3 seconds have elapsed.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|{{ai|Power Chord|Sona|Melody|image=*none*}} Bonus:}} Tagged allied champions gain {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} for 3 seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|10 to 18}}% {{as|(+ 2% per 100 of '''Sona's''' AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.spellshield:
|notes        = 
* To achieve a 99% {{tip|slow}} with the empowered attack via {{ai|Power Chord|Sona}}, it would require at least {{as|1475 AP}}.

R.name: Crescendo
R.description: Sona plays her ultimate chord, stunning enemy champions and forcing them to dance and dealing magic damage to them.
R.tooltip: Sona strikes an irresistible chord, Stunning enemy for {{ stunduration }} seconds and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Sona}} strikes an irresistible chord in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and briefly {{tip|stuns}} them.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sona''' strikes an irresistible chord in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|stuns}} them for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.notes:
{{Effect at cast time start}}
* While stunned by ''Crescendo'', enemies will perform their Dance emote.
